channel.title: snailsploit — research
channel.description: AI security research and offensive methodology by Kai Aizen

item.title: Adversarial Prompting: Complete Guide
item.description: End-to-end methodology covering direct, indirect, multi-turn, and agentic prompt injection.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: MCP vs A2A Attack Surface
item.description: Comparative threat model: where Model Context Protocol and Agent-to-Agent diverge in trust boundaries.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: Memory Injection Through Nested Skills
item.description: Skill injection + memory poisoning = self-healing autonomous implant. Validated against DVWA and Juice Shop in agent harness.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: Self-Replicating Memory Worm
item.description: Adversarial self-replicating prompt that survives across sessions and propagates via long-term memory writes — the AI-worm primitive applied to persistent agent state.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: ChatGPT Sandbox: Pickle RCE + DNS Chain
item.description: Pickle deserialization RCE chained with DNS exfil to break out of the Code Interpreter sandbox.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: The 30% Blind Spot — LLM Safety Judges
item.description: Empirical study showing LLM-as-judge safety classifiers miss ~30% of adversarial output classes.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)

item.title: ChatGPT Canvas DNS Exfiltration
item.description: DNS exfiltration via rendered Canvas content — triggers lookups without outbound HTTP.
item.author: research@snailsploit.com (Kai Aizen)
